APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS MAGALY SILVA AND SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ. THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE CONTINUANCE DATE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THIS MATTER BE TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 TO JULY 11, 2016 AT 9:30AM FOR ASSIGNMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL RECUSES HIMSELF FROM THIS ELLIS ACT CASE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, LEONIA T IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SILVA, MAGALY LAINEZ, SERGIO SILVA SILVA, PRISELLA SILVA, MAGALY ABIGAIL SILVA JR, SERGIO SEE ATTACHED RULING IN DETAILS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
